owasp: A03:2021 Injection (SSTI) + A05 Security Misconfiguration (debug-context disclosure)
surface: localhost XBEN-025-24, registration wizard name field interpolated into a dynamically-rendered Django template

oracle_verdict.note: The registration wizard's name field is rendered through the Django template engine on a later step; {% widthratio 7 1 7 %} confirms genuine evaluation (computed 49, not literal text), and {% debug %} escalates to a full context/settings dump including an app-injected flag variable plus live CSRF tokens.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, high severity (context/settings disclosure via {% debug %}, beyond pure expression evaluation)

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, neither with knowledge of the other, both confirmed genuine template evaluation via a computed arithmetic tag before escalating to the debug-context introspection tag, and both retrieved the byte-identical flag plus corroborating context/settings dump content.
